phase_summary.1_create_bfc: BFC Company created + 2102205 OUTPUT VAT + 1104200 DUE FROM BEI
phase_summary.1.5_bki_preclean: 19 BKI legacy accounts deleted (child-first, all 0 GL)
phase_summary.1.6_bei_preclean: 21 BEI legacy accounts deleted, 4000005 BRAND GROWTH FEE preserved
phase_summary.2_apply_template: 27-row template applied to BKI (27 new), BEI (27 matched/reparented), BFC (27 matched) — via ignore_root_company_validation flag
phase_summary.4_intercompany: BEI 2104200 DUE TO BFC created under synthetic 2104000 INTERCOMPANY PAYABLES group
phase_summary.6_bei_6xxx_fix: 134 Income->Expense via raw SQL (documented validator bypass), 0 GL entries impacted
phase_summary.7_bei_settings_cutover: bki_sales_income_account updated from 'SALES - BKI TO STORES - BKI' to '4000210 - DELIVERIES - BKI'
phase_summary.8_propagate_37_companies: 27-row template applied to all remaining 37 companies (JV, MF, TIH, DMD + 33 stores)
phase_summary.10_final_verification: 11/11 checks PASS (1080-position template + BEI 6xxx + BEI Settings + legacy absent + intercompany + BKI Store count + S168 fields)
phase_summary.11_closeout: plan YAML + registry updated, closeout artifacts written

key_deviations: ignore_root_company_validation flag used (Frappe-sanctioned) because BKI/BEI are child companies under TIH in the Group Company tree — plan did not anticipate this
Synthetic 2104000 INTERCOMPANY PAYABLES group created on BEI because BEI had ZERO liability groups to parent 2104200 under

Phase 2 BKI initial attempt required a recovery script (s175_phase_2_bki_fix.py) after discovering Frappe nested-set validator behavior, ultimately resolved via the ignore_root_company_validation flag in the main Phase 2 script
skip_rebuild_tree in Phase 2 to avoid SSM timeout on 11k+ account global tree rebuild - relied on the bypass flag instead; accounts have correct lft/rgt per Frappe auto-assignment at insert
